mapper.select: SELECT * FROM article WHERE status = 1 AND is_published = 1 ORDER BY CASE WHEN is_featured = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, (view_count * 0.3 + like_count * 0.5 + comment_count * 0.2) DESC, publish_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM article WHERE status = 1 AND is_published = 1 AND is_featured = 1 ORDER BY publish_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM article WHERE status = 1 AND is_published = 1 ORDER BY (view_count + like_count + comment_count) DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT * FROM article WHERE status = 1 AND is_published = 1 AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY publish_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article WHERE status = 1 AND is_published = 1 AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article WHERE status = 1 AND is_published = 1 AND author_id IN
#{id}
